zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwerfyl verch Gwrgeneu於大約1097年出生在威爾士拉德諾斯爾時，她的父親Gwrgenas ap Hywel49歲，母親Margred ferch Rhys15歲。她於1129年與Cadwaladr ap Gruffudd在威爾士安格萊阿福拉福 卡素結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1197年在英國威爾斯波斯享年101歲。

zh-hans.Aberffraw Castle, Anglesey, , Wales: 威尔士安格萊阿福拉福 卡素
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwerfyl verch Gwrgeneu于大约1097年出生在威尔士拉德諾斯爾时，她的父亲Gwrgenas ap Hywel49岁，母亲Margred ferch Rhys15岁。她于1129年与Cadwaladr ap Gruffudd在威尔士安格萊阿福拉福 卡素结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1197年在英国威尔斯波斯享年101岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gwerfyl
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name composed of gwair ‘bend, ring, circle’ + the mutated form of mul ‘shy, modest’.

variants.name: Gweirful
meanings: Traditional name composed of gwair ‘bend, ring, circle’ + the mutated form of mul ‘shy, modest’.

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Gwerfyl verch Gwrgeneu was born about 1097, in Radnorshire, Wales, her father, Gwrgenas ap Hywel, was 49 and her mother, Margred ferch Rhys, was 15. She married Cadwaladr ap Gruffudd in 1129, in Aberffraw Castle, Anglesey, Wales. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1197, in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 101.

fr.Bangor, Caernarvonshire, , Wales: Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwerfyl verch Gwrgeneu est née environ 1097, à Radnorshire, Galles, son père, Gwrgenas ap Hywel, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Margred ferch Rhys, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Cadwaladr ap Gruffudd en 1129, à Aberffraw Castle, Anglesey, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1197, à Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 101 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwerfyl verch Gwrgeneu um 1097 in Radnorshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gwrgenas ap Hywel 49 und ihre Mutter Margred ferch Rhys 15. Sie hat 1129 in Aberffraw Castle, Anglesey, Wales Cadwaladr ap Gruffudd geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1197 im Alter von 101 Jahren in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwerfyl verch Gwrgeneu è nata il circa 1097 nel Radnorshire, Galles, sua padre, Gwrgenas ap Hywel, aveva 49 anni e sua madre, Margred ferch Rhys, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Cadwaladr ap Gruffudd nel 1129, nel Aberffraw Castle, Anglesey, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1197, nel Powys, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 101 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwerfyl verch Gwrgeneuが約1097年にウェールズラドノーシュアイアで生まれた時，父Gwrgenas ap Hywelは49歳，母Margred ferch Rhysは15歳であった。1129年にウェールズアングレセイアバーフラウ カストルでCadwaladr ap Gruffuddと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1197年にイギリスウェールズポウイスで101歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwerfyl verch Gwrgeneu(이)가 대략 1097년 웨일스 라드노르실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gwrgenas ap Hywel(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margred ferch Rhys(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1129년 웨일스 앤글레시 압르프롤 카스틀에서 Cadwaladr ap Gruffudd(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1197년 영국 웨일스 파우이스에서 101세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwerfyl verch Gwrgeneu nasceu aproximadamente 1097, em Radnorshire, Gales, seu pai, Gwrgenas ap Hywel, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Margred ferch Rhys, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Cadwaladr ap Gruffudd em 1129, em Aberffraw Castle, Anglesey, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1197, em Powys, Gales, United Kingdom, com 101 anos.

ro.Bangor, Caernarvonshire, , Wales: Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwerfyl verch Gwrgeneu родилась около 1097 г. в местности радноршир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Gwrgenas ap Hywel было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Margred ferch Rhys, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Cadwaladr ap Gruffudd в 1129 г. в местности абирффрав кастл, англеси, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1197 г. в местности поуис, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 101 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gwerfyl verch Gwrgeneu nació aproximadamente 1097, en Radnorshire, Gales, su papá, Gwrgenas ap Hywel, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Margred ferch Rhys, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Cadwaladr ap Gruffudd en 1129, en Aberffraw Castle, Isla Oscura, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1197, en Powys, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 101 años.
